title: Warp-Mod
body:
## Warp Mod
### Simple teleporatation mod.
Without permission support so everyone can use it.
Rather for singleplayer/lan 

**Mod do not works with any other mod that has /warp command**

Every player creates own warp list.

Commands list:
- **/warp list** - list of created warps
- **/warp tp** <warp-name> - teleport to given warp
- **/warp set** <warp-name> - creating warp with given name
- **/warp del** <warp-name> - deleting warp with given name
- **/warp help** - list of available commands
